company.name: Financial & Tax Planning | BFS Advisory Group
company.description:
# Financial & Tax Planning | BFS Advisory Group ## Create the life you want. ### Plan for the future with confidence. Your browser does not support the video tag. #### Awards and Accolades [![Dallas500 Award](https://static.fmgsuite.com/media/InlineContent/originalSize/4e6c9c42-8b37-412d-964a-a02af954efad.jpg)](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/our-news) ![Real People.
Backed By Experience.
Independent & Objective Advice built by Industry Insiders
](https://static.fmgsuite.com/media/WebsiteBoxImage/originalSize/947d938b-9abe-47be-8896-1a2607ad8212.jpg?v=1) ## Real People. **Backed By Experience. Independent & Objective Advice built by Industry Insiders ** Welcome to **BFS Advisory Group**, a Dallas-based wealth management firm where we help our clients to use their money to live the lives they truly want. Too often, the financial services industry leads with product sales, leaving many people confused about what they really need. Instead of saying “it shouldn’t be that way,” **we’re changing the game**. We build your plan focused on you, your goals, your values, and your purpose. Our **Certified Financial Planners** and credentialed team will get to know what you really want to achieve with your money – from financial independence to making a difference in the world. We design a plan with built-in accountability that’s laser-focused on what you want to accomplish. And our flat-rate financial planning process allows us to charge you based on your comprehensive needs. ## Planning That Fits You.  **Not the Other Way Around** The bottom line is that if you pay a professional to help you with your money, you should expect objective, unbiased recommendations that are in your best interest – no exceptions, full stop. **We take it a step further at BFS Advisory Group** – we stand right in the middle of our client’s lives with them and make it a habit to celebrate them when they achieve their goals.   ## It starts with a question: **What matters most to you?** We start by uncovering your goals, the ones that drive your life and shape your future. ## More than assets, **it’s about opportunities.**  We analyze your full financial picture to find the opportunities that move you forward. ## Life happens. **We help you plan for it.** We identify risks and challenges early, so your plan stays on track, no matter what. ![The Services You Need. 
The Focus You Deserve.](https://static.fmgsuite.com/media/WebsiteBoxImage/originalSize/c1587073-4829-4772-81d8-d25d76fc2ebb.jpg?v=1) ## The Services You Need.  **The Focus You Deserve.** ### _From planning and investing to business strategy, we tailor our approach to your whole financial picture._ * With your life’s goals at the center, we build a framework for thoughtful decision-making to improve your potential for success. [Learn More](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/what-we-do) * As your go-to team of advisors, we bring  small business insights and financial planning expertise together to protect your most important asset: your business. [Learn More](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/what-we-do) * We create investment strategies tailored to your goals, risk tolerance, and timeline with portfolios built and managed in house. [Learn More](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/what-we-do) * As stewards of your financial plan, we help you preserve your assets for future generations, and partner with your attorney to facilitate a seamless transfer.  [Learn More](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/what-we-do) * Our extensive network of financial professional partners at your disposal includes estate planning, tax planning, philanthropic and banking experts. [Learn More](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/what-we-do) * Our team actively collaborates with your tax professional to identify tax liabilities or advantages that may influence our portfolio recommendations.  [Learn More](https://bfsadvisorygroup.com/what-we-do) ## See the Bigger Picture.  **Schedule a Consultation**
